root: ^Mandy: "Oh! Look who it is. Miss Li, right? Doing laundry at this hour?
^Mandy: "Uff. I'm super tired on the contrary. But my man is at his friends' place playing mahjong, and Tian is sick, so I'm stuck covering the night shift... "

chose_mahjong: ^Mandy: "Yeah. He had a few drinks tonight. When he gets like that, nobody can stop him."
chose_sick: ^Mandy: "Yeah. Fever's been running high since yesterday. But someone has to keep the machines running."
ask_about_arm: ^Mandy: "(Coldly) Hit it on the edge of an industrial dryer earlier. I'm clumsy. Now, what can I get you?"
